3Introduction
Trips+ Investigation ModuleThis module Performs investigations function. Investigation procedures are the same as of audit. Audit is 
distinguished from investigation by nature of complexity of the task and expected result. This Module provides 
tax authorities with the ability to conduct investigations and report on investigation outcomes
This module Performs investigations function. Investigation procedures 
are the same as of audit. Audit is distinguished from investigation by 
nature of complexity of the task and expected result. This Module provides 
tax authorities with the ability to conduct investigations and report on 
investigation outcomes
Trips+ Investigations Module is intrinsically supported by inbuilt risk 
engine, the engine configured by the business rules of the tax authorities.
Trips+ Investigations calculates (default business rule) presumptive 
tax based on historical information whilst considering any off-sets, this 
assessment can be reversed when the Taxpayer eventually files the return. 
The workflow also includes automated task and correspondence generation 
functionality.
This enables Trips+ to run queries at specified periods, such as at the end 
of the day to identify and record taxpayers who have not paid their debts by the due date, have paid late, have 
not retired the debt in full, have not submitted returns or have submitted them late. This workflow will enforce 
The Tax Authority’s business rules for non-compliance creating and assigning prioritized cases to designated 
officers for action either for Audit or investigations.
This module Performs investigations function. Investigation procedures are the same as of audit. Audit 
is distinguished from investigation by nature of complexity of the task and expected result. Inspection of 
a single return or multiple returns would be considered an audit, whereas investigations would occur for 
multiple taxpayer / tax period circumstances, where culpability is suspected or where entities have failed to 
register. (In other words, Investigation is an extension of audit activities with view of collecting evidence for 
prosecuting the suspect). 
Trips+ Investigation module allows for the creation and updating of cases manually by investigating Officer 
based on externally available information –e.g. tip-offs. The investigations module is supported by the Case 
Management Module
Design
The Investigations module is built on top of Trips+ Risk engine; The risk engine is configured to help identify 
tax payers who ought to be investigated

4Figure 1:  Investigation Case Management Flow
Based on the Business rules of the Tax Authority the flow ca take the following approach
• Once Investigation cases are created through workflow they are sent for review approval
• For Cases wot investigation a manager and investigation officer is assigned
• Investigation officer develops investigation strategy which is sent for approval
• Strategy is reviewed and either approved or rejected
• If approved then the strategy is executed
• On strategy execution a report will be Prepared utilizing the various MIS capabilities of Trips+
• Report is sent for approval through the workflow and if approved shared with the taxpayer, 
Investigations closes the case if determined to be false. In addition the case is subject to a decision to 
prosecute or not
• If determined for prosecution then the Case is assigned to the Legal department for further actionCases Created
